rationale: Name of the Maine limited partnership the limited partner is withdrawing from.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The limited partner named herein withdraws... (Name of Limited Partner)
rationale: Recital identifying the limited partner being withdrawn (used regardless of whether the partner is an individual or an entity).
Printed name of the individual limited partner who signed the 'Limited Partner*' line. Used when the withdrawing partner is a natural person.

label_verbatim: For Limited Partner(s) which are Entities: Name of Entity
rationale: Name of the entity acting as the withdrawing limited partner. Used instead of the individual block when the limited partner is a corporate/entity partner.

label_verbatim: For Limited Partner(s) which are Entities: By (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Printed name and capacity of the natural person signing on behalf of the entity limited partner. Mirrors the entity-officer signer pattern (general_partner_entity_N, incorporator_entity_N) under a withdrawing-LP role prefix.
